pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Authenticated primary-source searches covered open bounty/reward/paid issues created since 2026-07-14, plus a stars>=10 bounty filter. Results were dominated by generated bounty-board clusters; no new established, fixed-scope, verified-pay GitHub task passed the screen.

Open (created 2026-07-21T06:37:30Z; updated 2026-07-21T16:53:27Z), no comments and no matching open/closed PR found. Its programme is a ranked bug-hunt, not a per-issue guaranteed payout: Monk's primary rules state prizes only for the top three cumulative point totals ($350 cash + 3 months Pro; $100 + 2 months; $50 + 1 month), with final scoring by Monk. It requires a same-GitHub Monk signup and product use; deployment costs are borne by the hunter (quick runs are stated as single-digit dollars). Rejected: account/setup and possible paid cloud-cost requirement, plus no verifiable per-issue payment guarantee.
Open (created 2026-07-21T05:59:54Z; updated 2026-07-21T16:53:24Z), no comments and no matching open/closed PR found. Same Monk rules and payment/cost/identity restrictions as #125; rejected.

Open radar mirror created 2026-07-21T16:37:41Z and updated at 17:15:45Z. Its sole comment is an extensive submitted solution by another participant, so it is not low competition. The issue body exposes only a scraped '1000' field with no currency, payer, escrow, payment route, payout trigger, or deadline. Rejected as already submitted and unverified payment.

All eight current open bounty-mode tasks were re-fetched with `taskmarket task get` and `taskmarket task submissions`. No bounties had pitches/proofs/bids relevant to their bounty mode. Exact submission/unique-worker counts were 4/4, 89/34, 99/38, 165/35, 30/13, 514/59, 459/81, and 264/66. The 4/4 task explicitly requires a mainnet Base x402 payment/signature; the old 264/66 task requires a Base Sepolia x402 signature. All others exceed the <=10 unique-competitor limit; several also require payment/signature flows.
The issue remains open but the user's own PR #97103 remains open (created 2026-07-21T10:57:35Z, updated 2026-07-21T12:33:22Z). It is not a new alert.

rejected.reason: Contest-style, ranked payment instead of guaranteed per-issue payout; requires Monk account/product use and potentially paid deployment.
Contest-style, ranked payment instead of guaranteed per-issue payout; requires Monk account/product use and potentially paid deployment.
Already has a visible solution submission; payment metadata is incomplete and unverified.

Current open bounty-mode tasks have 4, 13, 34, 35, 38, 59, 66, or 81 unique workers. The only <=10 task requires a mainnet x402 EIP-3009 payment signature; no listed task is eligible under the free/no-wallet-action and competition gates.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
